/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/smp.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/smp.dir/src/AppController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smp.dir/src/MusicPlayer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smp.dir/src/Playlist.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smp.dir/src/UIHelpers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smp.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o smp  -lSDL2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2_mixer.so -ltag -lz -lncursesw /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libformw.so -lstdc++fs
